notifications.demo.welcomeSummary: You've received 10 diamonds! Check in daily to earn more for free.
notifications.demo.welcomeDetail:
Hi, welcome to 小野 AI! 🎉

You've received 10 diamonds as a welcome gift — start creating right away.

💡 Quick tips to get started:

1. **Earn free diamonds** — Check in daily to collect diamonds, with bigger rewards for streaks
2. **Start creating** — Use BananaPro model to generate stunning images and videos from prompts
3. **Inspiration feed** — Browse creations from other users and remix with one click
4. **Join the community** — Scan the WeChat QR code to join our AI creator community for tips and free credits

Happy creating!
notifications.demo.updateSummary: You can now browse trending creations in Inspiration.
notifications.demo.updateDetail: The Inspiration page now supports search, likes, and one-click remix. Open Inspiration to discover high-quality prompts.
notifications.demo.reportSummary: You created 12 works this week and gained 3 favorites.
notifications.demo.reportDetail: Great momentum this week. Try combining inspiration prompts with your own references to improve style consistency.

landing.announcement1Content:
名为：蛋糕api 的novel中转站说明：

文生图api站，可在酒馆或tavo或支持正则和支持novel官方接入方式的项目中接入生图(非百分百适配)：https://keai.keai.shop

可在网站上注册充值并创建令牌，教程可看网站首页，同时本网站可直接输入蛋糕api的秘钥使用novel绘画
landing.step1Desc: Visit the platform, register with your email, and log in to access all features.
landing.step2Desc: Go to your account page after login, redeem a key or top up credits to use AI generation.
landing.step3Desc: Enter a prompt in the generate page, pick a model, and get your AI-generated result in seconds.
landing.apiSubtitle: All endpoints use JSON. Replace the Base URL with your deployment address.
landing.apiAuthDesc: Login with email and password to receive a JWT Token. Include it in the Authorization header for subsequent requests.
landing.apiModelsDesc: Retrieve all supported AI models and their credit pricing. No authentication required.
landing.apiGenerateDesc: Unified generation endpoint. Set type to image or video. Requires Authorization header.

seo.tools.description: Free online image toolkit: format conversion & compression (PNG/JPG/WebP), image to SVG, AI image-to-prompt. Browser-based processing, no upload needed.

seo.imageToSvg.description: Free online tool to convert PNG, JPG, BMP images to SVG vector graphics. Adjustable colors, blur, path simplification with multiple presets. Browser-based.
seo.imageToSvg.keywords: image to SVG,PNG to SVG,JPG to SVG,online SVG converter,raster to vector,free SVG tool,vectorize image

seo.imageConvert.description: Free online image format converter and compressor. Convert between PNG, JPG, WebP, BMP with adjustable quality. Real-time preview, browser-based, no upload to server.
seo.imageConvert.keywords: image format converter,online image compressor,PNG to JPG,JPG to WebP,WebP to PNG,image converter,free image compression,convert image format
seo.reversePrompt.title: AI Image to Prompt - Generate AI Art Prompts from Images | 小野 AI
seo.reversePrompt.description: Upload any image and AI generates the corresponding creative prompt. Supports English and Chinese output, compatible with multiple AI art models.
seo.reversePrompt.keywords: image to prompt,AI prompt generator,reverse prompt,AI art prompt,describe image AI,image prompt extraction

apiKey.title: API Key Settings
apiKey.description: Enter your API Key from the upstream platform. Generation will use your own credits.
apiKey.hint: Key is stored only in your browser locally and is never uploaded to the server. You will need to re-enter it on a different device.
